name: @vibe-engineer-starter/e2e-ui-web-fixture
description: I-17A web E2E + UI-verification suite (DL-13). Playwright E2E specs driving the REAL served golden-web app through the golden flow (seed/classify -> list -> render/read) with real selector assertions; UI-verification specialist suite (overlap/clipping, spacing/alignment, responsive-layout, truncation, color/contrast, accessibility, visual-regression) each emitting structured evidence; viewport/device matrix; visual baselines + baseline-management contract; real-boundary witness runner. LLM/subjective visual review is advisory only and never the blocking signal. Domain-neutral sample/demo/reference (DL-13 / DL-20A).

vibeEngineer.consumptionModel: consumes the served golden-web app (I-17A) + I-16B shared client seam; deterministic specialists only; subjective review advisory
vibeEngineer.boundaryRule: deterministic UI defects hard-block; subjective/LLM visual review advisory only (DL-13); full E2E/visual is local/orchestrator-run only, never default CI (DL-18; mechanical §7)

//dependency-model: Graph-neutral: this fixture path is NOT a pnpm workspace member (pnpm-workspace.yaml = packages/*, packages/presets/*, packages/adapters/*, infra/pulumi), so the modeled runtime deps below add ZERO edges to the real harness workspace graph and require no lockfile reconciliation. The REAL resolve of @playwright/test + @axe-core/playwright + pixelmatch + pngjs requires a serialized EXTEND dep handoff (root manifest + pnpm-lock.yaml reconcile, I-20S-class) AND Playwright browser binaries (`playwright install`) — they are ABSENT from the entire repo (verified: 0 in lockfile, none in node_modules, no resolve-hook anchor context). NO install, NO manifest/lockfile edit, NO mock is performed in-license.
